title: RIDE CONNECTION - 211info
text: RIDE CONNECTION RIDE CONNECTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides transportation services for outings such as medical appointments, grocery shopping, community centers, and social visits. Lift-equipped transportation is available. Travel training on public transit is also available. Personal and group travel training is provided by a trainer or peer who accompanies the participant or group to assist them in learning to use public transportation. 9955 NE Glisan Street Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: -Varies by service, primarily older adults and people with disabilities. Some programs define older adult as 65 and older. -Travel training is primarily for age 60 and older and adults who identify as having a disability Hours: Scheduling hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5pm. Most transportation services are available Monday-Friday. Email (503) 226-0700 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Service Center (503) 226-0700 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None for most services, donations are accepted DOCUMENTS: None required for intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet MAX Blue, Green, and Red Lines stop at Gateway / NE 99th Avenue Transit Center MAX Station 3 blocks away. Services: Disability Related Transportation Senior Ride Programs Travel Training for Older Adults/People with Disabilities If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. RIDE CONNECTION
